query:
UPDATE projects
SET suppressed = 1,
    suppressionReason = 'Suppressed pre-Thursday W20: stale/completed or no Portable Air relevance for Daniel Zec territory.'
WHERE id IN (
  120160,  -- M4-M5 Link WestConnex Stage 3: completion=2024, stale
  240019,  -- Noarlunga Heights Super Centre: retail redevelopment, stale, no PA signal
  210008,  -- NSW Transformer Manufacturer: stale, energy sector, low PA relevance
  390003,  -- Regional NSW Health Rehabilitation Facility: stale, health sector, no PA signal
  300008   -- Blind Creek Solar Farm: stale, solar/energy, no PA signal
);
